zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Berney於1382年出生在英國盧特藍德時，她的父親John Berney20歲，母親Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham21歲。她於1405年與John Browne在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯坦福結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1460年11月22日在英國林可爾史爾斯坦福享年78歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯坦福哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Berney于1382年出生在英国盧特藍德时，她的父亲John Berney20岁，母亲Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham21岁。她于1405年与John Browne在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯坦福结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1460年11月22日在英国林可爾史爾斯坦福享年78岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯坦福哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Berney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Biorna ‘son of Biorna’. See Burney 2 and McBurney .
French: from a derivative of the personal name Bernard or any other name composed of the ancient Germanic element ber(n) ‘bear’.

variants.name: Burney
meanings: English (northern, of Norman origin): habitational name from Bernay in Eure, France, named with a Gaulish personal name Brenno + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish (Antrim) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Biorna ‘son of Biorna’, a Gaelic form of the Old Norse personal name Bjarni (from björn ‘bear cub, warrior’).

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Berney was born in 1382, in Rutland, England, her father, John Berney, was 20 and her mother, Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham, was 21. She married John Browne in 1405, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 22 November 1460, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 78, and was buried in All Saints' Church, Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Stamford All Saints Church, Stamford, Li: All Saints' Church, Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Berney est née en 1382, à Rutland, Angleterre, son père, John Berney, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé John Browne en 1405, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 novembre 1460, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à All Saints' Church, Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Stamford All Saints Church, Stamford, Li: All Saints' Church, Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Berney 1382 in Rutland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Berney 20 und ihre Mutter Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham 21. Sie hat 1405 in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom John Browne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. November 1460 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in All Saints' Church, Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Berney è nata il nel 1382 nel Rutland, England, sua padre, John Berney, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato John Browne nel 1405, nel Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 22 novembre 1460, nel Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolta a All Saints' Church, Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Berneyが1382年にイギリスルトランドで生まれた時，父John Berneyは20歳，母Isabel Elizabeth Heveninghamは21歳であった。1405年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードでJohn Browneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1460年11月22日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードで78歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードアル サイントス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Stamford All Saints Church, Stamford, Li: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드 앨 세인츠' 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Margery Berney(이)가 1382년 영국 루틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Berney(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1405년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 John Browne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 11월 22일 영국 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드 앨 세인츠' 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Berney nasceu em 1382, em Rutland, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Berney, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com John Browne em 1405, em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de novembro de 1460, em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 78 anos, e foi sepultada em All Saints' Church, Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Stamford All Saints Church, Stamford, Li: алл сеинц' чурч, стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Berney родилась в 1382 г. в местности рутланд, Англия, её отцу по имени John Berney было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Elizabeth Heveningham, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Browne в 1405 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 22 ноября 1460 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности алл сеинц' чурч, стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
